final_answer:
Hello! My name is Emma Smith and I'm reaching out because I'd like to return an item I recently received. My account is emma_smith_8564 and I'm located in New York, NY 10192.

I received a laptop and I'd like to return it for a full refund. I believe I placed the order sometime around April 2023, though I'm not 100% certain of the exact date. The reason I'd like to return it is that I found a better deal on the same item elsewhere.

Could you please help me initiate a return and process a full refund to my original payment method? If for some reason the item is not eligible for a return, I'd also like to know if it's possible to cancel the order instead.

Thank you so much for your help — I really appreciate it!
